baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, uncached derived-doc prep
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after clearing the derived-doc cache before each run

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, warmed derived-doc cache
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after one cache-populating call

environment.note: The cache is keyed by user/project and doc signature, so repeated work reuses the same derived graph surfaces until the document set changes.
